title: Quick Replant
description: Quick Replant automatically replants crops immediately after harvesting them. Simply break your fully-grown crops as usual, and the mod instantly replants them using seeds or crops from your inventory.
body:
# Quick Replant

Harvest crops faster and never waste time replanting again with this lightweight auto-replant mod for Minecraft!

Quick Replant automatically replants crops immediately after harvesting them. Simply break your fully-grown crops as usual, and the mod instantly replants them using seeds or crops from your inventory.

Perfect for farming large fields without the repetitive extra clicks.

## Features

**Instant Replanting** – Automatically replants crops after harvesting  
**Fortune Supporting** - Works with Fortune enchantment.  
**Simple Toggle**  – Press **R**  to enable or disable the mod anytime  
**Supports Multiple Crops**  – Works with:

 **Wheat**    
 **Carrots**   
 **Potatoes**   
 **Beetroot**   
 **Nether Wart** 

**Lightweight**  – Minimal performance impact  
**Clean & Simple**  – No complicated setup required

## How to Use

### Quick Start

1\. Harvest fully-grown crops normally  
2\. The crop is instantly replanted automatically  
3\. Press **R** anytime to toggle Quick Replant on or off

## Installation

### Requirements:

**\-Minecraft 1.21**   
**\-Fabric Loader**   
**\-Fabric API**  

### Steps 

1\. Install Fabric Loader for Minecraft 1.21  
2\. Download and install Fabric API  
3\. Download Quick Replant  
4\. Place both mods into your \`mods\` folder  
5\. Launch Minecraft and enjoy easier farming!

## Perfect For

Large Survival Farms – Harvest huge crop fields quickly  
Multiplayer Servers – Speed up farming tasks  
Villager Trading – Farm crops more efficiently  
Technical Worlds – Simplify automated manual farming  
Casual Survival – Remove repetitive replanting

## Technical Details

Client-side lightweight utility mod  
Fabric 1.21 compatible  
Low resource usage  
Simple keybind support  
Easy to use with no configuration needed
